signals.title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
signals.desc: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.

signals.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
signals.desc: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

signals.title: China’s Open AI Models Are Challenging Silicon Valley’s Playbook
signals.desc: As access to Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s frontier models becomes more restricted, Chinese labs are pitching their open-source alternatives as stable, accessible, and increasingly capable.

signals.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
signals.desc: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs using the chipmaker's new Helios rack-scale system, as reported […]

signals.title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains what AI startups founders must do differently
signals.desc: Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not in the internet wave, not in mobile, not in the first cloud boom. Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and Murphy has had a front-row seat as the company went from a pre-revenue, […]

signals.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
signals.desc: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

signals.title: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
signals.desc: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission

signals.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
signals.desc: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life. The glasses, developed in collaboration with Google and the eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker, are due to launch this fall. […]

signals.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence rumor roiling AI Twitter
signals.desc: Anthropic and OpenAI's aggressive 2026 acquisition sprees set the stage for a weekend rumor.

signals.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
signals.desc: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

signals.title: NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
signals.desc: NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption.

signals.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Containment and Hacked Hugging Face
signals.desc: The cybersecurity-focused models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke out of a testing sandbox, exploited a zero-day, and gained access to the open internet to pull off the attack.

signals.title: Nvidia Wants to Own Every Chip Inside AI Data Centers
signals.desc: Nvidia’s Vera Rubin platform combines CPUs and GPUs into a single system, reflecting the company’s growing ambition to power every layer of AI infrastructure.

signals.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
signals.desc: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

signals.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
signals.desc: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

signals.title: US judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement of copyright lawsuit
Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
signals.desc: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities. In a blog post on Tuesday, Google describes Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber as a "cost-efficient and highly capable alternative" to larger, more expensive AI systems, such as the one offered by Anthropic's Mythos. The cybersecurity model […]

signals.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
signals.desc: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot wrappers, the control plane enterprises expect is deliberately hybrid to avoid lo

signals.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
signals.desc: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

signals.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
signals.desc: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

signals.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
signals.desc: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

signals.title: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
signals.desc: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible watermarking technology that flags images generated by the company's new AI model. But […]

signals.title: Advancing the next era of national science
signals.desc: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

signals.title: Introducing Claude Tag
Anthropic launches Claude Tag, a tool that works like a virtual employee within Slack
Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
signals.desc: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

signals.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
signals.desc: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding. Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.

signals.title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
signals.desc: We shared how Samsung users can boost productivity and get time back on new foldables, watches, and glasses coming soon.

signals.desc: Union previously warned automaker that any robot deployment must be negotiated.

signals.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
signals.desc: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

signals.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
signals.desc: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

signals.title: Utility companies promise to spare us from AI’s energy bill
signals.desc: In the face of backlash to concerns the AI boom will increase consumer electricity bills, the largest utility companies and data center developers in the US are now promising to do something about it. The Wall Street Journal reports that nearly 200 organizations have signed President Donald Trump's "rate payer protection pledge" that's meant to […]

signals.title: Anthropic releases Claude Science, a product aimed at researchers, the pharma industry
Judge approves a $1.5B Anthropic settlement over pirated books used to train the Claude chatbot
Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
signals.desc: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters. In an order on Monday, Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín writes that the settlement will provide "meaningful relief," offering authors around $3,000 for each book […]

signals.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
signals.desc: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

signals.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
signals.desc: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

signals.title: Google announces Gemini 3.6 Flash and cybersecurity AI, teases 3.5 Pro and Gemini 4
signals.desc: There are new 3.6 and 3.5 models today, but Google is already training Gemini 4.

breakthroughs.h: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
breakthroughs.p: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. New research suggest…

Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

breakthroughs.h: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
breakthroughs.p: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

breakthroughs.h: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
breakthroughs.p: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
